ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each element */,
  "element_name" TEXT /* Name of the element (e.g., Hydrogen, Helium) */,
  "atomic_number" INTEGER /* Atomic number of the element */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass of the element */,
  "electron_configuration" TEXT /* Electron configuration of the element (e.g., 1s1, 1s2 2s1) */,
  "isotope_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each isotope of the element */,
  "isotope_mass" REAL /* Mass of the specific isotope */,
  "half_life" TEXT /* Half-life of the isotope (if applicable) */,
  "is_stable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the isotope is stable */,
  "isotope_abundance" REAL /* Natural abundance of the isotope (percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id", "isotope_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "particles" (
  "particle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each particle */,
  "particle_type" TEXT /* Type of particle (e.g., proton, neutron, electron) */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the element the particle belongs to */,
  "x" REAL /* Initial x-coordinate of the particle */,
  "y" REAL /* Initial y-coordinate of the particle */,
  "z" REAL /* Initial z-coordinate of the particle */,
  "xn" REAL /* Normalized x-coordinate of the particle */,
  "yn" REAL /* Normalized y-coordinate of the particle */,
  "zn" REAL /* Normalized z-coordinate of the particle */,
  "charge" INTEGER /* Charge of the particle (e.g., +1 for proton, -1 for electron) */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass of the particle */,
  "charge_state" INTEGER /* Charge state of the particle (e.g., 0 for neutral, +1 for ionized) */,
  "isotope_id" INTEGER /* ID of the isotope the particle belongs to */,
  "spin" TEXT /* Spin of the particle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("particle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_particles_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_particles_isotope_id FOREIGN KEY ("isotope_id") REFERENCES elements ("isotope_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the element being simulated */,
  "num_particles" INTEGER /* Number of particles in the simulation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the simulation */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, paused) */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions of the environment during the simulation (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "total_energy" REAL /* Total energy of the system at the start of the simulation */,
  "energy_units" TEXT /* Units of energy (e.g., eV, MeV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_particles" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "particle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the particle */,
  "x" REAL /* x-coordinate of the particle at the start of the simulation */,
  "y" REAL /* y-coordinate of the particle at the start of the simulation */,
  "z" REAL /* z-coordinate of the particle at the start of the simulation */,
  "vx" REAL /* x-velocity of the particle at the start of the simulation */,
  "vy" REAL /* y-velocity of the particle at the start of the simulation */,
  "vz" REAL /* z-velocity of the particle at the start of the simulation */,
  "charge" INTEGER /* Charge of the particle at the start of the simulation */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass of the particle at the start of the simulation */,
  "spin" TEXT /* Spin of the particle at the start of the simulation */,
  "isotope_id" INTEGER /* ID of the isotope the particle belongs to */,
  "charge_state" INTEGER /* Charge state of the particle at the start of the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id", "particle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_particles_isotope_id FOREIGN KEY ("isotope_id") REFERENCES elements ("isotope_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "particle_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "particle_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first particle involved in the interaction */,
  "particle_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second particle involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_time" TEXT /* Time of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., collision, scattering) */,
  "interaction_energy" REAL /* Energy of the interaction */,
  "interaction_position_x" REAL /* x-coordinate of the interaction */,
  "interaction_position_y" REAL /* y-coordinate of the interaction */,
  "interaction_position_z" REAL /* z-coordinate of the interaction */,
  "interaction_momentum_x" REAL /* x-component of the momentum change */,
  "interaction_momentum_y" REAL /* y-component of the momentum change */,
  "interaction_momentum_z" REAL /* z-component of the momentum change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_particle_interactions_particle_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("particle_id1") REFERENCES particles ("particle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_particle_interactions_particle_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("particle_id2") REFERENCES particles ("particle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_particle_interactions_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, institution) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last accessed the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
